message:
refactor(codegen): Add structured helpers for comp_expr_subs builtins

- Add emitToBoolWithSubs, emitAbsWithSubs, emitComplexWithSubs, emitPyTruthyWithSubs
- Migrate bool(), abs(), complex(), and pyTruthy patterns to use structured helpers

Reduces raw emit(")") patterns from 161 to 157 for guaranteed bracket matching.
